_about: Tencent (0700.HK) sum-of-the-parts. Core operating value comes from tencent.assumptions.json (RMB); investment portfolio + net cash added here; result converted to HK$/share. Data as of FY2025 results / June 2026 price.
_units: RMB millions; per-share in stated currency; shares in millions
_sources: Tencent FY2025 results (listed RMB672.7bn, unlisted RMB363.1bn, net cash RMB107.1bn); price HK$433 (2026-06-22); fx ~1 RMB = 1.087 HKD
_core_earnings: Core net earnings (non-IFRS, ex-investment) ~RMB245bn FY2025E, used for the stub P/E cross-check.
_portfolio: Listed at reported fair value with a 15% tax-on-disposal haircut; unlisted at carrying value with a 20% illiquidity/markdown haircut; then a 20% holding-company discount (lack of control + capital-allocation distrust) on the whole portfolio.
